connections.gloss: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

divide, have (inheritance), take as a heritage, (cause to, give to, make to) inherit, (distribute for, divide (for, for an, by), give for, have, leave for, take (for)) inheritance, (have in, cause to, be made to) possess(-ion).

connections.def: from 2818; heirship, i.e. (concretely) a patrimony or (genitive case) a possession:--inheritance. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: half, middle, mid(-night), midst, part, two parts.
